info.name: OpenCart – Built-in REST API
info.description:
Official built-in OpenCart catalog API (catalog/controller/api/*).

**Auth flow:**
1. Run 'Login – valid key' first → api_token saved to env
2. All subsequent requests use the session cookie (OCSESSID)

**Environment variables needed:**
- `baseUrl` = https://demo.opencart.com
- `api_key` = your API key from Admin > System > Users > API
- `api_token` = auto-set by Login request
- `cart_key`, `order_id` = auto-set by cart/order requests

request.description: Authenticates with the API key and returns api_token. Run this first.

exec: // Save api_token to env after login

request.description: Should return error.key warning.
No key sent. Should return error.
Adds a product to the session cart. Requires valid api_token cookie.
Product 40 (iPhone) with option. option[option_id]=option_value_id
Returns all products currently in the cart.
Edit quantity of a cart row. cart key returned from Get cart.
Remove a product row from cart.
Set the shipping address for checkout.
Returns available shipping methods after address is set.
Select a shipping method. Value from Get shipping methods.
Set billing / payment address.
Returns available payment methods.
Select Cash on Delivery.
Select Bank Transfer.

item.name: 📦 Order
item.description: Place and manage orders via API

request.description: Confirms and places the order. Cart must have items and addresses set.
Retrieve placed order details.
Update order status (e.g. 5=Complete).
Delete an order by ID.
Apply a coupon code to the current cart.
Should return an error for invalid coupon.
Apply a gift voucher code.
Attach customer info to the session for guest checkout.
Switch active currency to USD.
Switch to Egyptian Pound.
Should fail or silently reject unknown currency.

exec: // Global pre-request: attach api_token as query param if set
